hero.heading: Build the Future
hero.subheading: We're always looking for passionate people to join our mission of building next-gen AI and web automation tools.

ctaBanner.heading: Send an open
ctaBanner.subheading: We're always on the lookout for great talent. Send us your resume and we'll reach out if a role opens up.

departments.heading: Software & AI
departments.subheading: Build the core technologies that power our intelligent solutions.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.description: Build robust web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. Experience with Tailwind CSS is a plus.
responsibilities: Architect, build, and maintain robust web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js.
Collaborate cross-functionally with design and product teams to deliver intuitive user experiences.
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in full-stack web development.
Deep understanding of React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js.
Experience with modern styling tools like Tailwind CSS.
Familiarity with SQL/NoSQL databases and RESTful API design.
benefits: Flexible working hours and remote options.

jobs.title: AI / ML Engineer
jobs.description: Design and implement custom AI agents, NLP models, and automation workflows.
responsibilities: Design, train, and deploy machine learning models and NLP systems.
Integrate LLMs and custom AI agents into our core product offerings.
Research and evaluate the latest advancements in AI/ML to keep our tech stack modern.
Optimize model performance for high-throughput, low-latency applications.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 2 years focused on ML/AI.
Strong proficiency in Python, PyTorch, or TensorFlow.
Experience integrating and fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs).
Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design.
benefits: Flexible working hours and remote options.

jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
jobs.description: Manage our cloud infrastructure on AWS, build CI/CD pipelines, and ensure security.
responsibilities: Manage and scale our cloud infrastructure using AWS or GCP.
Design and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment.
Implement security best practices and ensure system compliance.
Monitor system performance and troubleshoot infrastructure issues.
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering experience.
Strong knowledge of AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Proficiency with Infrastructure as Code tools like Terraform or CloudFormation.
Experience with monitoring tools (e.g., Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana).
benefits: Flexible working hours and remote options.

departments.heading: Product &
departments.subheading: Shape how our users interact with the next generation of software.

jobs.title: UI / UX Designer
jobs.description: Create intuitive user interfaces and engaging experiences. Proficiency in Figma required.
responsibilities: Lead the design of web and mobile interfaces from wireframes to high-fidelity prototypes.
Conduct user research and usability testing to inform design decisions.
Maintain and expand our comprehensive design system.
Collaborate closely with engineers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation.
requirements: 3+ years of experience in UI/UX design for digital products.
Expert proficiency in Figma and prototyping tools.
A strong portfolio demonstrating complex problem-solving and visual design skills.
Understanding of HTML/CSS capabilities and limitations.
benefits: Flexible working hours and remote options.

jobs.title: Motion Designer
jobs.description: Bring our applications to life with smooth, high-performance micro-animations.
responsibilities: Design and implement engaging micro-animations and transitions for web interfaces.
Create promotional video content and product demo animations.
Collaborate with developers to translate motion concepts into CSS or Framer Motion code.
Ensure all animations are performant and accessible.
requirements: 2+ years of experience in motion design, specifically for digital products.
Proficiency in After Effects, Lottie, or similar animation tools.
A portfolio showcasing UI motion design and micro-interactions.
Familiarity with web animation principles (e.g., easing, duration).
benefits: Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI product interfaces.
